message:
perf(doctor): speed up tests from 44s to ~12s via branch-per-test isolation

Extract core check logic from path-based functions into internal *DB and
*ForIssues variants that accept sql.DB or issue slices directly. This lets
tests use newTestDoltStore (branch-per-test on shared DB) instead of creating
per-test databases (~0.5-2s each for CREATE DATABASE + schema init).

- validation.go: extract checkDuplicateIssuesDB, checkOrphanedDependenciesDB,
  checkChildParentDependenciesDB
- maintenance.go: extract checkStaleClosedIssuesDB,
  checkPersistentMolIssuesForIssues, checkMisclassifiedWispsForIssues,
  checkPatrolPollutionForIssues
- Rewrite validation_test.go and maintenance_cgo_test.go to use branch isolation
- Fix pre-existing TestCheckPhantomDatabases_OK failure (stray phantom cleanup)
- Net -273 lines, 217 tests pass, 0 fail

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/onyx
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
